notes: Wizard: drop the Done celebration step. Step 3 (Turn to adjust volume) now redirects to the dashboard 1.2 s after volume confirms ≥5 — instead of a 2.2 s checkmark interstitial. Helper text turns green ('volume changed') as the only confirmation. Net: 4-step zero-tap wizard (Setup → Turn clockwise → Select speaker → Turn to adjust volume) → dashboard. Dropped the unused .checkwrap + checkPop/checkDraw CSS.
